mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donation_order (out_trade_no, user_id, lost_found_id, total_amount, subject, trade_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{outTradeNo}, #{userId}, #{lostFoundId}, #{totalAmount}, #{subject}, #{tradeStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, l.title as lostFoundTitle FROM donation_order d LEFT JOIN lost_found l ON d.lost_found_id = l.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
SELECT d.*, u.username, l.title as lostFoundTitle FROM donation_order d LEFT JOIN user u ON d.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN lost_found l ON d.lost_found_id = l.id ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, SUM(total_amount) as total FROM donation_order WHERE trade_status IN ('TRADE_SUCCESS', 'TRADE_FINISHED') GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at) ASC LIMIT 30
